cn=張緝 — Wei politician (died 254). Not chapter 10's Zhang Ji.
cn=張既 — Cao Cao's official (died 223). Not chapter 10's Zhang Ji.
cn=張機 — Zhang Zhongjing the physician. Not a Dong Zhuo lieutenant.
cn=張吉 — Han dynasty politician. Not chapter 10's Zhang Ji.
Zhang Miao — different person (Gaoling, Cao Wei era).
Zhang Miao — different person (Jin dynasty).
cn=王訪 — different Wang Fang (Han dynasty).
cn=陳恭 — different Chen Gong (Han dynasty general from Jiangxia).
cn=程郁 — different Cheng Yu (Liu Zhang faction).
Jia Xu — different person (Cao Wei general, aliases Jia Si).
Liu Dai the Yanzhou governor died 192. Chapter 10's "Liu Dai then submitted" is the Cao Cao general [1326].
cn=荀俁 — different Xun Yu (Cao Wei politician).

cn=馬玉 — different Ma Yu (Shu Han era).
cn=爰邵 — different Yuan Shao (Cao Wei general).
